name: aws-authentication
description:
Signs outbound requests to AWS-hosted backends using AWS Signature Version 4 (SigV4).
Supports two credential-acquisition modes: AWS STS AssumeRole for temporary credentials,
or a static IAM user access key/secret pair. Intended for backends such as API Gateway with
IAM auth, Lambda Function URLs, OpenSearch, and S3 that require SigV4-signed requests.
